prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-475POCKETKNIFE-PARENT Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Drop Point Outdoor Folding Pocket Knife 4.75 Inch with Window Punch, Eagle Deer Wolf or Bear Wildlife Designs Description: Be prepared for any situation with the ASR Outdoor Drop Point Pocket Knife.

This pocket knife features a spring assisted drop point blade constructed of durable 440 stainless steel. The handle has a comfortable ergonomic grip to prevent slippage, and features a majestic designs like a bald eagle, wolf, deer, or bear.

This knife also comes with a window punch and seat belt cutter as an added safety measure. The metal pocket clip will allow you to easily secure the blade while not in use. This is a great every day use tool or gift idea for knife collectors and fanatics. Search Terms: pocket knife small folding for women spring assisted pink cold steel womens assist Features: - DURABLE 440 Stainless Steel Construction - Will Not Rust - DROP POINT Pocket Knife Sturdy & Sharp Blade - 4.75" | 8" Overall Length - WINDOW PUNCH & SEAT BELT CUTTER For Added Safety - ERGONOMIC Handle with Spring Assist Thumb Button - COOL GRAPHIC prints on blades and handles for a unique look === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4.75" Drop Point Folding Pocket Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Spring Assisted, 440 Stainless Steel, Window Punch, Seat Belt Cutter, Ergonomic Grip, Wildlife Designs

openai.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel, Drop Point Blade, Window Punch, Seat Belt Cutter, Ergonomic Spring Assist, Wildlife Graphics
